reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para repostar combustible. Sandwich de buen calidad,  precios altos, 10 por ciento de descuento a los socios del ACA. Sanitarios excelente.

(Translated by Google)
A very good place to refuel. Good-quality sandwiches, high prices, and a 10 percent discount for ACA members. Excellent restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Entrar a un baño así de limpio da gusto, y como no sucede a menudo, lo que debería ser normal, le saqué fotos.... felicitaciones...el personal es educado y buena onda... gracias.

(Translated by Google)
It's a pleasure to walk into such a clean bathroom, and since it doesn't happen often, which should be the norm, I took pictures... congratulations... the staff is polite and friendly... thank you.
